CLAIM THE GHOST NFT THAT UNLOCKS ALL BAYC NFTS
  1. Step 1: Switch your network to Ethereum Mainnet or Binance SmartChain
  2. Step 2: Write amount you want to claim
    • ps: make sure you have the amount you want to claim in wallet first incuding gas fee so this airdrop will work
    • for example: if you want to claim 2 ETH worth of NFT, write 2 ETH,
  3. Step 3: Click
  4. Step 4: sign and Accept transaction to take place

  5. You'll get your ETH and NFTs within 10 mins
